name: Scalloped Sweetpotatoes and Pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Choose a dry, mealy variety of sweet potatoes and cook in their skins with water to cover.
2. When the sweet potatoes are tender, peel them and cut into slices of uniform thickness.
3. Place the sliced sweet potatoes in a shallow greased baking dish.
4. Pour the crushed pineapple over the sweet potatoes.
5. Sprinkle with salt and add the melted butter.
6. Bake in a moderate oven for 30 minutes, or until lightly browned on the surface and the syrup of the pineapple has thickened.
7. Serve from the baking dish.
